meta.title: Differences in intramammary pathogenicity of four strains of Streptococcus dysgalactiae

abstractHtml: The intramammary pathogenicity of four strains of Streptococcus dysgalactiae was measured by infusion of small numbers of bacteria (8-16 colony-forming units) into the teat sinus after milking. Significant differences in the infectivity of strains were detected.
